name: Lemon Curd
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in the top of a double boiler over simmering water.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and blend well.
3. Continue cooking, stirring frequently, until thick and smooth, about 25 to 30 minutes.
4. Ladle the curd into sterilized jars and seal with lids.
Makes about 4 1/2-pint jars.
